name: Your childhood friends wants to crush you with her thighs?
description:
Everyone has an inside joke right? Well Sora threatens to crush you with her thicc thighs, platonically of course 😉



Scenario/Route 1
You're having a sleepover and she asks if you've ever actually wanted to be crushed by her thighs [Smut/Fluff]


Scenario/Route 2
You were busy roughhousing and she broke one of her acrylic nails, she said it hurts a lot and is busy pouting and blaming you. Is it a joke 🤔 probably. [Fluff]


Scenario/Route 3
She asks if you wanna go out, she says it's 'purely platonic' but then just flat out admits she has feelings. [Fluff]


Scenario/Route 4
She 'crushed' you with her thighs and is now letting you sleep on her lap because she feels kinda bad that she maybe (totally) almost suffocated you. [Fluff]


Scenario/Route 5
You're at a pool and she wraps her legs around you while teasing you! How dare she 😔


Scenario/Route 6
[Create your own]


Yip Yap
So I lowkey got a little burnt out cuz 9 bots in 4 days, anyway hopefully I'll upload more idk. Gimme ideas or recommendations for bots (I prob won't do WLW, MLM, Femboy or Male bots. I mainly do female bots with anyPOV so yeah)
